description_long: This is a large, rectangular school building complex with a central courtyard, surrounded on three sides by two-story wings featuring rows of evenly spaced windows. The main entrance is marked by a prominent, gabled-roof building at the front, flanked by two smaller structures connected via staircases and covered walkways. The roofs are steeply pitched and covered in reddish-brown tiles, giving the complex a traditional European appearance. The exterior walls are white, with symmetrical window placement and clear separation between the main and auxiliary buildings. The courtyard is open and spacious, likely serving as a gathering or recreational area for students. The overall design is orderly and institutional, with a focus on functionality and accessibility.
description: A large, white school complex with red-tiled roofs, central courtyard, and symmetrical two-story wings connected by staircases and walkways.
description_view_0: Side view showing the U-shaped main building, central courtyard, and the front entrance complex with connecting staircases.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, flanked by two smaller buildings and staircases leading to the upper walkways.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the courtyard and the rear of the entrance complex.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open courtyard and the back of the main entrance building, with the two wings extending forward.
